title: SwarmKit Fleet Credential
description: The opaque, scoped API-key credential a fleet is issued at enrollment (design details/control-plane/19-fleet-enrollment-protocol.md). `value` is the bearer secret, shown once. A Mode-A register credential carries `scope`; a Mode-B join credential carries `tier` + `key_ref`. Only its fingerprint is retained by the issuer.

value.description: The bearer secret. Shown once; never re-fetchable.

fingerprint.description: Short display id of the credential (audit/rotation UI), never used to authenticate.

scope.description: Mode-A membership scope: monitor (observe) or manage (may deploy).

tier.description: Mode-B connector tier — bounds the commands the panel may enqueue.

key_ref.description: Mode-B: env/file reference the connector installs the secret under (env:VAR).

expires_at.description: Optional expiry (ISO-8601). Absent/null = no expiry until rotated or revoked.
